agent.name: StableCoin Wallet Agent
agent.description: AI agent that manages your SBC stablecoin wallet across Base, Radius, and Tempo — check balances, send, bridge, pay for x402/MPP-protected resources, view analytics, manage webhooks, and control spending policies.

secrets.name: SBC_AGENT_ID
secrets.description: Your agent ID from the SBC agent payments platform (agents.stablecoin.xyz → API Keys panel)

secrets.name: SBC_AGENT_API_KEY
secrets.description: Your API key from the SBC agent payments platform (agents.stablecoin.xyz → API Keys panel)
